title: Payroll
desc: Dedicated payroll desk — salary template, monthly run, loans, payslips and advances.
menuNote: No sidebar sub-menu by design — the 5 sections (Template/Manage/Loans/Payslip/Advance/Reports) are pill-buttons at the top of the payroll view.
note: Driven by the shared EPAL.payroll engine; posts accruals/payments/advances/loans/encashment to the GL tagged companyId:travels.
